text:
(In reply to iron.udjin from comment #8)
Not sure that it'd help; I've noticed that in many cases I don't get errors like others get. In this case I'm using amd64 as well. Tried on 12-current, 11.2 jail, also tried inside the jail so couldn't pull anything from host system and no error at all for me.
